meta.title: Desulfovibrio tunisiensis sp. nov., a novel weakly halotolerant, sulfate-reducing bacterium isolated from exhaust water of a Tunisian oil refinery
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology
